title.en: Medical gas pipeline systems - Part 1: Pipeline systems for compressed medical gases and vacuum

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for design, installation, function, and testing of medical gas pipeline systems.
standards.scope: Medical gas pipeline systems -- Pipeline systems for compressed medical gases and vacuum.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-12: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of critical care ventilators
